top_risks.title: Potential AWS access key in source
top_risks.description: A potential secret or credential-like value was detected in source code or configuration.
top_risks.recommendation: Remove embedded cloud credentials from source files and move them into a secure secret store.

top_risks.title: Debug mode enabled in code or config
top_risks.description: A source pattern associated with insecure implementation or configuration was detected.
top_risks.recommendation: Disable debug mode in production-facing code and configuration.
